message:
refactor: migrate HashMap/HashSet → BTreeMap/BTreeSet across entire codebase

Replace all uses of HashMap with BTreeMap and HashSet with BTreeSet to
guarantee deterministic iteration order throughout the runtime. This is
a critical property for asupersync's lab runtime, which provides
deterministic scheduling and trace replay — non-deterministic iteration
over hash maps was a source of subtle test flakiness and made trace
replay unreliable when iterating over task sets, obligation registries,
endpoint tables, or evidence ledgers.

Scope of changes (41 files across all subsystems):

- franken_decision, franken_evidence crates: EvidenceLedger's
  expected_loss_by_action field, DecisionOutcome, DiffContext
- channel subsystem: clock_skew, crash, fault, partition evidence emission
- cli/error: CliError context map
- combinator/bulkhead: BulkheadRegistry and its all_metrics() return type
- config: ConfigLoader overrides, apply_env_overrides internals
- cx: Cx macaroon evidence emission
- database/sqlite: connection pool and query caching internals
- evidence_sink: scheduler, cancel, budget evidence emission helpers
- grpc: health checker and server endpoint registries
- http/pool: connection pool tracking maps
- lab subsystem: fuzz harness (violation_counts, certificate_hashes),
  virtual HTTP client (headers, request builder), all five oracle modules
  (cancellation_protocol, deadline_monotone, loser_drain, obligation_leak,
  rref_access) — internal tracking maps for tasks, regions, races, etc.
- messaging/nats: subscription and topic registries
- net: DNS cache entries, WebSocket handshake header maps
- obligation: dialectica and no_aliasing_proof tracking structures
- observability: context propagation, metrics registries, obligation and
  task inspector maps
- process: Command environment variable map
- record: SymbolObligationTracker and SymbolicObligationRegistry indices
  (by_id, by_symbol, by_object, by_holder, by_region)
- server/connection: connection state tracking
- types: SymbolSet and TypedSymbol internal maps
- web: extract, response, router header/route maps

Where BTreeMap requires Ord on key types, adds PartialOrd + Ord derives
to RRefId (lab/oracle/rref_access). No behavioral changes beyond
guaranteed iteration order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -400,7 +400,7 @@ fn emit_skew_evidence(sink: &Arc<dyn EvidenceSink>, action: &str, base_ns: u64,
         component: "clock_skew_injector".to_string(),
         action: format!("inject_{action}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("inject_{action}"),
             0.0,
         )]),

@@ -505,7 +505,7 @@ fn emit_crash_evidence(sink: &Arc<dyn EvidenceSink>, action: &str, count: u32) {
         component: "channel_crash".to_string(),
         action: format!("inject_{action}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("inject_{action}"),
             0.0,
         )]),

@@ -344,7 +344,7 @@ fn emit_fault_evidence(sink: &dyn EvidenceSink, fault_type: &str, context: &str)
         component: "channel_fault".to_string(),
         action: format!("inject_{fault_type}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("inject_{fault_type}"),
             0.0,
         )]),

@@ -379,7 +379,7 @@ fn emit_partition_evidence(sink: &Arc<dyn EvidenceSink>, action: &str, src: Acto
         component: "channel_partition".to_string(),
         action: format!("partition_{action}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("partition_{action}"),
             0.0,
         )]),

@@ -766,7 +766,7 @@ impl<Caps> Cx<Caps> {
             component: "cx_macaroon".to_string(),
             action: action.clone(),
             posterior: vec![1.0],
-            expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(action, loss)]),
+            expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(action, loss)]),
             chosen_expected_loss: loss,
             calibration_score: 1.0,
             fallback_active: false,

@@ -174,7 +174,7 @@ pub fn emit_scheduler_evidence(
         component: "scheduler".to_string(),
         action: suggestion.to_string(),
         posterior,
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([
             ("meet_deadlines".to_string(), f64::from(timed_depth)),
             ("drain_cancel".to_string(), f64::from(cancel_depth)),
             ("process_ready".to_string(), f64::from(ready_depth)),
@@ -209,7 +209,7 @@ pub fn emit_cancel_evidence(
         component: "cancellation".to_string(),
         action: format!("cancel_{cancel_kind}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("cancel_{cancel_kind}"),
             0.0,
         )]),
@@ -245,7 +245,7 @@ pub fn emit_budget_evidence(
         component: "budget".to_string(),
         action: format!("exhausted_{exhaustion_kind}"),
         posterior: vec![1.0],
-        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::HashMap::from([(
+        expected_loss_by_action: std::collections::BTreeMap::from([(
             format!("exhausted_{exhaustion_kind}"),
             0.0,
         )]),
